description: Qualifies inbound sales leads via webhook, enriches with Clearbit company data, scores with LLM for problem-fit, routes tier-A/B/C leads to Slack/HubSpot/SendGrid, and responds with status and lead_id within 3 seconds.

trigger.description: Receives inbound sales lead form submissions as JSON POST body

steps.name: Extract and Validate Lead Fields
steps.description: Extracts and validates required fields (name, email, company, role, problem_description) from webhook body. The POSTed JSON is under $json.body in n8n webhook triggers. Sets a valid flag and lead_id.
steps.error_handling: On code error, respond with 400 and error message

steps.name: Gate: Validate Required Fields Present
steps.description: Passes if all required lead fields are valid; fails to 400 response.
steps.error_handling: Route false branch to 400 error response

steps.name: Respond 400 Invalid Payload
steps.description: Sends a 400 error response for missing required fields back to the caller.

parameters.responseBody: {"status":"error","message":"Missing required fields: name, email, company, or problem_description"}

steps.error_handling: Terminal node for invalid payload path

steps.name: Respond 200 Accepted Immediately
steps.description: Immediately responds to the webhook caller with 200 and the lead_id after validation passes, satisfying the <3s SLA. Processing continues asynchronously.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'success', lead_id: $json.lead_id, message: 'Lead received and is being processed.' }) }}

steps.error_handling: On failure, log and continue processing

steps.name: Enrich Company Data via Clearbit
steps.description: Calls Clearbit Company Enrichment API using the lead's email domain. Continue on fail is enabled so enrichment failures are handled gracefully. Note: Clearbit 404 returns {error: 'Not Found'} and 202 async responses return a body without metrics — both are treated as enrichment failures in step_6 and defaults are used.
steps.error_handling: Continue on fail; step_6_check_clearbit detects failure and sets clearbit_failed=true with empty enrichment defaults

steps.name: Check Clearbit Response and Set Enrichment
steps.description: Checks if Clearbit returned a valid response or failed. Merges enrichment data with original lead fields retrieved from the named upstream node. Sets clearbit_failed=true with defaults on failure. Both 404 ({error: 'Not Found'}) and 202 async (missing metrics) responses are treated as failures.
steps.error_handling: On code error, alert and abort workflow

steps.name: Score Lead Problem-Fit via LLM
steps.description: Calls OpenAI Chat Completions API to score the lead's problem description for fit. Returns a JSON object with problem_fit_score (0-10) and fit_reasoning.

messages.content: You are a sales qualification assistant. Given a lead's problem description, company size, and industry, output ONLY a JSON object with two fields: problem_fit_score (integer 0-10, where 10 is perfect fit for a B2B SaaS sales automation product) and fit_reasoning (one sentence). Do not include any other text, markdown, or code fences.

steps.error_handling: Continue on fail; gate step_8 detects failure and routes to default score path

steps.name: Gate: Validate LLM Response Received
steps.description: Checks that the LLM returned a valid choices array. Fails if response malformed or error.
steps.error_handling: False branch triggers LLM failure alert and uses default score

steps.name: Alert LLM Failure and Set Default Score
steps.description: Posts an alert to the internal Slack error channel when LLM scoring fails (no valid choices array returned).

body.text: ={{ ':rotating_light: LLM scoring failed for lead ' + $('Check Clearbit Response and Set Enrichment').first().json.lead_id + ' (' + $('Check Clearbit Response and Set Enrichment').first().json.email + '). Defaulting problem_fit_score to 5.' }}

steps.error_handling: Best-effort alert; continue regardless of result

steps.name: Set Default Score After LLM Failure
steps.description: Spreads all lead fields from the enriched lead node and adds default problem_fit_score=5 and empty reasoning when LLM fails. Also computes tier and composite score so the output shape matches step_11.
steps.error_handling: Terminal fallback; always succeeds

steps.name: Parse LLM Score and Compute Lead Tier
steps.description: Parses the LLM JSON response to extract problem_fit_score. Strips markdown code fences before parsing. Retrieves enriched lead fields from the named enrichment node. Computes final lead tier (A/B/C) and composite score. Sets llm_parse_failed flag if JSON parse fails.
steps.error_handling: On code error, alert and abort

steps.name: Route Tier A vs B/C
steps.description: Routes tier-A leads to hot Slack channel; tier-B/C continue to next branch. Receives input from whichever of step_11 or step_10 ran (both feed directly into this node).
steps.error_handling: Default to false branch on error

steps.name: Post Tier-A Lead to #sales-hot Slack
steps.description: Posts a hot lead alert to the #sales-hot Slack channel for tier-A leads.

body.text:
={{ ':fire: *HOT LEAD [Tier A]* — ' + $json.name + ' (' + $json.email + ') from ' + $json.company + '
Industry: ' + $json.industry + ' | Employees: ' + $json.employees + '
Problem: ' + $json.problem_description + '
Fit Score: ' + $json.problem_fit_score + '/10 | Composite: ' + $json.composite_score + '
Lead ID: ' + $json.lead_id }}

steps.error_handling: Continue on fail; proceed to HubSpot restore step

steps.name: Route Tier B vs C
steps.description: Routes tier-B leads to SDR queue Slack channel; tier-C to nurture email path.
steps.error_handling: Default to false branch on error

steps.name: Post Tier-B Lead to #sales-queue Slack
steps.description: Posts a qualified lead to the #sales-queue Slack channel for SDR follow-up.

body.text:
={{ ':telephone_receiver: *SDR QUEUE LEAD [Tier B]* — ' + $json.name + ' (' + $json.email + ') from ' + $json.company + '
Industry: ' + $json.industry + ' | Employees: ' + $json.employees + '
Problem: ' + $json.problem_description + '
Fit Score: ' + $json.problem_fit_score + '/10 | Composite: ' + $json.composite_score + '
Lead ID: ' + $json.lead_id }}

steps.error_handling: Continue on fail; proceed to HubSpot restore step

steps.name: Send Tier-C Nurture Email via SendGrid
steps.description: Sends a nurture email to tier-C leads via SendGrid transactional email API.
steps.error_handling: Continue on fail; proceed to HubSpot restore step

steps.name: Restore Full Lead Fields for HubSpot
steps.description: Restores the full scored lead object from the named scoring step so HubSpot sync has all required fields. Uses try/catch to safely fall back from step_11 to step_10 in case the LLM failure path ran and step_11 was never executed.
steps.error_handling: On code error, alert and abort

steps.name: Sync Lead to HubSpot Contacts
steps.description: Creates or updates a HubSpot contact with all lead and scoring data using the upsert endpoint. NOTE: The following custom contact properties must be pre-created in HubSpot before deployment: lead_tier, lead_composite_score, lead_fit_score, lead_id, lead_problem_description, lead_fit_reasoning. Missing properties will cause a 400 error.
steps.error_handling: Continue on fail; gate step_21 checks for success and alerts on failure

steps.name: Gate: Validate HubSpot Sync Success
steps.description: Checks if HubSpot sync returned a non-empty results array. Routes to alert on failure (false branch). True branch (success) is a terminal no-op — no node connected.
steps.error_handling: False branch posts HubSpot failure alert; true branch terminates

steps.name: Alert HubSpot Sync Failure
steps.description: Posts a HubSpot sync failure alert to #sales-alerts Slack channel. Only connected to the false (failure) branch of step_21. Includes HubSpot response details for debugging. Check that required custom HubSpot properties are created if this alert fires frequently.

body.text: ={{ ':warning: HubSpot sync FAILED for lead ' + $('Restore Full Lead Fields for HubSpot').first().json.lead_id + ' (' + $('Restore Full Lead Fields for HubSpot').first().json.email + '). Tier: ' + $('Restore Full Lead Fields for HubSpot').first().json.tier + '. Manual sync required. Ensure custom HubSpot properties (lead_tier, lead_composite_score, lead_fit_score, lead_id, lead_problem_description, lead_fit_reasoning) are created in HubSpot.' }}

steps.error_handling: Best-effort; always continue

gates.note: LLM failure path feeds directly into tier routing, bypassing the removed merge node (step_12)
LLM success path feeds directly into tier routing, bypassing the removed merge node (step_12)
Tier-A path feeds directly to restore step; removed problematic 3-input passThrough merge (step_18)
Tier-B path feeds directly to restore step; removed problematic 3-input passThrough merge (step_18)
Tier-C path feeds directly to restore step; removed problematic 3-input passThrough merge (step_18)
True branch (HubSpot success) is terminal with no connection. Only false branch (failure) connects to step_22 alert.

error_handling.on_workflow_failure: Post alert to #sales-alerts Slack channel with lead_id, error message, and stack trace. Webhook responds with 500 and error status.

output.destination: Webhook HTTP response (sent immediately after validation via step_4_respond_early)
output.description: All valid leads receive an immediate <3s webhook response after validation. Processing (enrichment, scoring, routing, HubSpot sync) continues asynchronously. Tier A: hot Slack + HubSpot. Tier B: queue Slack + HubSpot. Tier C: nurture email + HubSpot. Invalid leads receive 400 synchronously.

credentials: Clearbit API key (HTTP header Authorization: Bearer)
OpenAI API key (HTTP header Authorization: Bearer)
HubSpot private app token (HTTP header Authorization: Bearer)
SendGrid API key (HTTP header Authorization: Bearer)
Internal Slack poster (no auth required per spec)
security.pii_handling: Lead PII (name, email, phone) is transmitted to Clearbit, OpenAI, HubSpot, and SendGrid. Ensure DPA agreements are in place. Do not log raw webhook bodies containing PII in n8n execution logs.
security.data_flow: Webhook -> n8n -> [immediate 200 response] -> Clearbit (enrichment) -> OpenAI (scoring, sends problem_description) -> HubSpot (CRM sync) -> Slack (alert) / SendGrid (email)
security.hubspot_setup: The following custom contact properties MUST be created in HubSpot before deploying this workflow: lead_tier (single-line text), lead_composite_score (number), lead_fit_score (number), lead_id (single-line text), lead_problem_description (multi-line text), lead_fit_reasoning (multi-line text). Missing properties will cause HubSpot upsert to return 400 errors and trigger the step_22 failure alert.

cost_estimate.breakdown: OpenAI gpt-4o-mini ~150 tokens in + 150 tokens out ≈ $0.0001; Clearbit Company lookup ≈ $0.005–$0.010 (depending on plan); HubSpot, SendGrid, Slack minimal/free tier costs

test_cases.name: Happy path — Tier A enterprise lead

input.name: Jane Smith
input.problem_description: We need to automate our outbound sales pipeline and SDR workflows at scale across 50 reps

test_cases.name: Happy path — Tier C small company low fit

input.name: Bob Lee
input.problem_description: I need a simple contact form for my website

input.name: Alice Johnson
input.problem_description: We want to streamline sales automation

test_cases.name: Missing required field — no problem description
Happy path — Tier B mid-size company

input.name: Maria Garcia
input.problem_description: We are looking to improve our CRM data quality and lead scoring accuracy for our 100-person sales team

test_cases.name: Completely empty body — all fields missing
